languages.text: "И еще одно. У моих агентов есть кодовые фразы на случай по-настоящему важных донесений. "Воск еще теплый" — и я слушаю, даже если сказанное звучит как сущий бред. Если впереди еще много циклов, это избавит нас от лишних споров".

traits.locale_text: "И еще одно. У моих агентов есть кодовые фразы на случай по-настоящему важных донесений. "Воск еще теплый" — и я слушаю, даже если сказанное звучит как сущий бред. Если впереди еще много циклов, это избавит нас от лишних споров".

languages.text: "And there is one more thing. My agents have code phrases for the most vital reports. Say the words, 'The wax is still warm,' and I shall listen, even if what is being said sounds like rubbish. If there are many more cycles to come, this will save us a lot of unnecessary arguing."
languages.original_text: "И еще одно. У моих агентов есть кодовые фразы на случай по-настоящему важных донесений. "Воск еще теплый" — и я слушаю, даже если сказанное звучит как сущий бред. Если впереди еще много циклов, это избавит нас от лишних споров".

traits.locale_text: "And there is one more thing. My agents have code phrases for the most vital reports. Say the words, 'The wax is still warm,' and I shall listen, even if what is being said sounds like rubbish. If there are many more cycles to come, this will save us a lot of unnecessary arguing."

"And there is one more thing. My agents have code phrases for the most vital reports. Say the words, 'The wax is still warm,' and I shall listen, even if what is being said sounds like rubbish. If there are many more cycles to come, this will save us a lot of unnecessary arguing."

"And there is one more thing. My agents have code phrases for the most vital reports. Say the words, 'The wax is still warm,' and I shall listen, even if what is being said sounds like rubbish. If there are many more cycles to come, this will save us a lot of unnecessary arguing."

languages.text: “还有一件事。我的特工会用暗语来传递最重要的情报。只要你说出‘蜡烛仍有余温’，我就会听你说完，哪怕你说的话听起来像胡扯。要是后面还有很多次循环，这能帮我们省去很多不必要的争执。”
languages.original_text: "And there is one more thing. My agents have code phrases for the most vital reports. Say the words, 'The wax is still warm,' and I shall listen, even if what is being said sounds like rubbish. If there are many more cycles to come, this will save us a lot of unnecessary arguing."

traits.locale_text: “还有一件事。我的特工会用暗语来传递最重要的情报。只要你说出‘蜡烛仍有余温’，我就会听你说完，哪怕你说的话听起来像胡扯。要是后面还有很多次循环，这能帮我们省去很多不必要的争执。”

languages.text: « Une dernière chose avant de nous quitter. Mes agents usent de phrases codées pour me transmettre leurs rapports les plus sensibles. Prononcez les mots "la cire est encore chaude", et je vous écouterai, même si vos propos n'ont ni queue ni tête. Si nous avons encore tant de cycles devant nous, cela nous évitera bon nombre de palabres inutiles. »
languages.original_text: "And there is one more thing. My agents have code phrases for the most vital reports. Say the words, 'The wax is still warm,' and I shall listen, even if what is being said sounds like rubbish. If there are many more cycles to come, this will save us a lot of unnecessary arguing."

traits.locale_text: « Une dernière chose avant de nous quitter. Mes agents usent de phrases codées pour me transmettre leurs rapports les plus sensibles. Prononcez les mots "la cire est encore chaude", et je vous écouterai, même si vos propos n'ont ni queue ni tête. Si nous avons encore tant de cycles devant nous, cela nous évitera bon nombre de palabres inutiles. »

languages.text: "Son bir şey daha. Ajanlarım, hayati derecede önemli raporlarda şifreli ifadeler kullanır. 'Bal mumu hâlâ sıcak' dendiğinde... Söylenenler ne kadar saçma gelirse gelsin dinlerim. Daha birçok döngüye maruz kalacaksak bu şekilde gereksiz tartışmalardan kurtulabiliriz."
languages.original_text: "And there is one more thing. My agents have code phrases for the most vital reports. Say the words, 'The wax is still warm,' and I shall listen, even if what is being said sounds like rubbish. If there are many more cycles to come, this will save us a lot of unnecessary arguing."

traits.locale_text: "Son bir şey daha. Ajanlarım, hayati derecede önemli raporlarda şifreli ifadeler kullanır. 'Bal mumu hâlâ sıcak' dendiğinde... Söylenenler ne kadar saçma gelirse gelsin dinlerim. Daha birçok döngüye maruz kalacaksak bu şekilde gereksiz tartışmalardan kurtulabiliriz."

languages.text: «Y una cosa más: mis agentes tienen frases en código para los informes más cruciales. Diga "La cera aún está caliente" y escucharé, aunque lo que diga me parezca una chorrada. Si hay más ciclos en el futuro, eso nos ahorrará muchas discusiones innecesarias».
languages.original_text: "And there is one more thing. My agents have code phrases for the most vital reports. Say the words, 'The wax is still warm,' and I shall listen, even if what is being said sounds like rubbish. If there are many more cycles to come, this will save us a lot of unnecessary arguing."

traits.locale_text: «Y una cosa más: mis agentes tienen frases en código para los informes más cruciales. Diga "La cera aún está caliente" y escucharé, aunque lo que diga me parezca una chorrada. Si hay más ciclos en el futuro, eso nos ahorrará muchas discusiones innecesarias».

languages.text: "Und da ist noch eine Sache. Meine Agenten haben Losungen für die wichtigsten Berichte. Sagt 'Das Wachs ist noch warm', und ich werde zuhören, selbst wenn das Gesagte unsinnig klingt. Falls noch viele Zyklen kommen, wird uns das viele sinnlose Diskussionen ersparen."
languages.original_text: "And there is one more thing. My agents have code phrases for the most vital reports. Say the words, 'The wax is still warm,' and I shall listen, even if what is being said sounds like rubbish. If there are many more cycles to come, this will save us a lot of unnecessary arguing."

traits.locale_text: "Und da ist noch eine Sache. Meine Agenten haben Losungen für die wichtigsten Berichte. Sagt 'Das Wachs ist noch warm', und ich werde zuhören, selbst wenn das Gesagte unsinnig klingt. Falls noch viele Zyklen kommen, wird uns das viele sinnlose Diskussionen ersparen."

languages.text: 「もう一つ、言っておきたいことがあります。私の代理人は、最も重要な報告には暗号語を使っています。もしあなたが『ろうそくはまだ温かい』と言ったら、私は、どんなにくだらない話でも聞いてあげます。もしこれからさらに多くのサイクルが続くなら、この暗号語を使うことで、私たちは無駄な議論を避けることができます。」
languages.original_text: "And there is one more thing. My agents have code phrases for the most vital reports. Say the words, 'The wax is still warm,' and I shall listen, even if what is being said sounds like rubbish. If there are many more cycles to come, this will save us a lot of unnecessary arguing."

traits.locale_text: 「もう一つ、言っておきたいことがあります。私の代理人は、最も重要な報告には暗号語を使っています。もしあなたが『ろうそくはまだ温かい』と言ったら、私は、どんなにくだらない話でも聞いてあげます。もしこれからさらに多くのサイクルが続くなら、この暗号語を使うことで、私たちは無駄な議論を避けることができます。」
